nodes.itemHTML: • cl-jsonstars0 - A highly customizable JSON encoder and decoder. MIT.
• Snoozestars140 - A RESTful web framework. Web server agnostic. Currently has support for Hunchentoot and Clack. Routes are just functions and HTTP conditions are just Lisp conditions. LLGPL.
• Practical TensorFlow.js - Deep Learning in Web App Development by Juan De Dios Santos Rivera.
• Practical Machine Learning in JavaScript - TensorFlow.js for Web Developers by Charlie Gerard.
• DeepAR — Augmented reality face filters for any platform with one SDK. Free plan provides up to 10 monthly active users (MAU) and tracking up to 4 faces
• Automate.io - Simple and complex automation workflow tool with over 200+ app integrations. 300 monthly actions and 5 bots are free
• IPFire - Hardened GNU/Linux based router and firewall distribution forked from IPCop.
• OPNsense - Hardened FreeBSD based firewall and routing platform forked from pfSense.
• pfSense - FreeBSD firewall and router distribution forked from m0n0wall.
• 🍓 CakePHP Dockerstars5 - A cakephp/app template for docker and kubernetes setup.
• HyperLap2Dstars98 - Visual editor for complex 2D worlds and scenes with a runtime for libGDX.
• Spine - Skeleton-based animation tool that focuses specifically on 2D animation for games.
• vue-datasetstars17 - A set of Vue.js components to display datasets with filtering, paging, and sorting capabilities!
• BlueJ — A free Java Development Environment designed for beginners, used by millions worldwide. Powered by Oracle & simple GUI to help beginners.
• Sharry - Convinient file sharing web application that allows you to upload files and get a url back that can then be shared. (GNU GPLv3+)
• Brandon Grasley's Space Shooter Game - Video tutorial series on making a complete Android game from scratch.
• Complete Ansible Course 2020 by DevOps Journey - Free Video Course on Ansible including labs to follow along.
• love2d-lua-websocketstars3 - A simple event-driven websocket client library [IPv4]
• Clapperstars122 - Simple and modern media player.
• Accessible Vue – Get started with Accessibility in Vue.js! by Marcus Herrmann (March 2021)
• Decathlon Design System (Vitamin)
• v-toxmlstars3 - XML Serialization library for V.
• Nixstars552 - Package manager for Linux and other Unix systems that makes package management reliable and reproducible.

• SnapShooter — Backup solution for DigitalOcean, AWS, LightSail, Hetzner and Exoscale, with support for direct database, file system and application backups to s3 based storage. Provides a free plan with daily backups for one resource.
• mikkelking:slingshotstars6 - Upload files directly to AWS S3, Google Cloud Storage and others in meteor.

• graspologicstars192 - Python package for statistical algorithms, models, and visualization for single and multiple networks.
    • Tutorials on algorithms and models.
• Love Letter Tracker - A knowledge tracker for the card game Love Letter.
• black-Voidstars246 - Includes account info, root user, using ssh, directory lotation, write permission, vcs info decorations.
• blackrainstars6 - Another git-aware theme.
• Fullnodestars192 - Javascript implementation of bitcoin.
• Apideck Components
• Introduction to College Mathematics with A Programming Language (1978) - E. J. LeCuyer (PDF)
• ColorKitstars395 - Advanced color manipulation for iOS.
• vue-virtual-treestars10 - Tree component for large amount of data, base on Vue3.
• Kanvasstars218 - A iOS library for adding effects, drawings, text, stickers, and making GIFs from existing media or the camera.
• AiHello AutoPilot - Amazon PPC Ads Automation Software.
• vue3-tabs-chromestars4 - A Vue3 component for Chrome-like tabs.
• pre-commit-hooks.nixstars100 - Run linters/formatters at commit time and on your CI.
• Swift Weekly Brief - A multi author curated newsletter.
• Brightroomstars2.2k - An image editor and engine using CoreImage.
• CodyFirestars230 - Powerful Codable API requests builder and manager for iOS. Based on Alamofire.
• PPAssetsActionControllerstars70 - Highly customizable Action Sheet Controller with assets preview.
• SPAlertstars1.1k - Native popup from Apple Music & Feedback in AppStore. Contains Done & Heart presets.
• IGStoryButtonKitstars22 - Easy-to-use button with rich animation inspired by instagram stories.
• SPPermissionstars4.3k - Simple request permission with native UI and interactive animation.
• SPLarkControllerstars740 - Custom transition between two controller. Translate to top.
• SPStorkControllerstars2.4k - Now playing controller from Apple Music. Customisable height.
• From base R to stringr - This vignette compares stringr functions to their base R equivalents to help users transitioning from using base R to stringr. Author: Sara Stoudt.
• linkedstars0 - Link your thoughts to days, distraction free.
• Web Scraping Reference: Cheat Sheet for Web Scraping using Rstars220 - Guide, reference and cheatsheet on web scraping using rvest, httr and Rselenium. Author: yifyan et al.

• lisp-stat - an environment for statistical computing, conceptually similar to R, that is also suitable for front-line production deployments. "It grew out of a desire to have an environment for rapidly prototyping analytical and A.I. solutions, and move directly to production environments with minimal friction."
    • https://lisp-stat.dev/
    • ships Luke Tierney's XLisp-Stat (a predecessor of R) as well as newer libraries.

• 👍 cl-gserverstars65 - an Erlang inspired GenServer. It is meant to encapsulate state, but also to execute async operations. Also with actors. Functionality regarding state is not unsimilar to Clojure's Agent or cl-actors. MIT.
• go-myanimeliststars21 - Go client library for accessing the MyAnimeList API.

• newtstars8 - Fat & fast theme – beautiful inside and out, styled segments done right. Extremely customizable, includes git, username, execution time, directory, background jobs and edit mode decorations.
• PyConWeb - Covers Django, Tornado, Flask, API frameworks. AsyncIO, networking, Frontend, JavaScript, and web security.
• Gosling - A grammar-based toolkit for scalable and interactive genomics data visualization.
• RocketGit — Repository Hosting based on Git. Unlimited Public & Private repositories.
• Similar Web — Analytics for Web & Mobile Apps. Free Plan offers 5 results per metric, 1 month of mobile app data & 3 months of website data.
• 2020stars188
• Open Sustainable Technologystars685 - Projects preserving stable climate, energy supply and natural resources.
• Materialize [Rust] - A source-available streaming SQL engine for maintaining materialized views on data from message brokers and databases.
• ksqlDBstars4.2k [Java] - A cloud-native, source-available database purpose-built for stream processing applications
• vitesse - Inspired by VS Code's Vitessestars69 theme. Includes git status decorations.
• RadioDotNet - Podcast about everything .NET-related: news, articles, libraries, events.
• mustache_template - A mustache template library that supports dart2js and dart2native.
• Grakn Examples
• classbasics/graknDemo
• Initiation au langage CircuitPython et à la puce nRF52840 - A French introduction to CircuitPython and the nRF52840.
• cuicstars12 - Clojure library providing a high-level API for UI test automation over the DevTools Protocol.
• bcftoolsstars375 - samtools/bcftools are a suite of tools for manipulating NGS data and can be used to call variants. [ paper-2009 | web ]
• DeepVariantstars2.3k - Deep learning-based variant caller [ paper-2018 ]
• Octopusstars201 - A polymorphic bayesian genotyping model with wide applicability. [ paper-2021 ]
• Colmenastars63 - A simple, stateless NixOS deployment tool modeled after NixOps and morph.
• crystal2nixstars5 - Convert shard.lock into Nix expressions.
• elm2nixstars67 - Convert elm.json into Nix expressions.
• BundleStatsstars151 - Generate bundle report(bundle size, assets, modules, packages) and compare the results between different builds
• Registryostars4 - UI and token based authentication server for onpremise docker registry
• tailwind-yew-builderstars11 - Builds Tailwind CSS for Yew using docker-compose. Also supports Trunk.
• Archivportal - German archives search engine.
• Bavarikon - Collection of Bavarian maps, places, newspapers etc.
• Deutsche Digitale Bibliothek - Over 12 million objects.
• Digitale Sammlungen - Collections of the Munich Digitization Center.
• leo bw - Platform of the State Archives of Baden-Württemberg.
• SLUB Dresden - Over 1.8 million graphic media (photographs, maps, drawings).
• UB Heidelberg - Manuscripts, documents, maps and literature.
• ZLB - Collections of the Berlin Central and State Library.
• Tempopedia - Digital History Directory.
• chrome-aws-lambdastars2.2k - Support for running Microsoft's Playwright on AWS Lambda and Google Cloud Functions.
• ManageEngine Log360 Cloud — Log Management service powered by Manage Engine. Free Plan offers 50 GB storage with 1 Month retention.

• Arvan Cloud — Offers cloud related services (CDN,Cloud DNS, PaaS, Security etc.). Free plan offers :
    • CDN with Free SSL. 50 GB Traffic + 1 Million HTTP(S) Requests.
    • Free Cloud DNS for unlimited domains.
    • Free Cloud Security with Basic DDoS Protection + 5 Firewall Rules.
    • Free VoD (Video On Demand) Platform with 10 GB Storage + 50 GB Traffic.
• Pithus - Open-Source APK analyzer. Still in Beta for the moment and limited to static analysis for the moment. Possible to hunt malwares with Yara rules. More here.
• Terraform Compliance - terraform-compliance - A lightweight, security and compliance focused test framework against terraform to enable negative testing capability for your infrastructure-as-code.
• LuLu - A firewall that aims to block unknown outgoing connections, protecting your privacy and your Mac.

• daselstars891 - Query and update data structures using selectors from the command line. Comparable to jqstars19.4k / yqstars1.5k but supports JSON, YAML, TOML and XML with zero runtime dependencies.
• editlystars2.8k - Command line video editor
• Space - User-owned, encrypted, and open source personal file storage and sharing on IPFS and Textile, with decentralized backups in Filecoin. Sourcestars5
• iuliiastars7 — transliteration Cyrillic to Latin in many possible ways (defined by the reference implementationstars50).
• charmdstars20 - A simple, extendable markdown renderer for your terminal.
• kopo-clistars11 - A Deno registry browser in the terminal.
• nixduinostars20 - Nix-based tool to help build Arduino sketches.
• ASP.NET Core 3.1 Succinctly - Simone Chiaretta, Ugo Lattanzi
• ASP.NET Core Documentation - Microsoft Docs
• Blazor: A Beginner's Guide - Ed Charbeneau (PDF) (email address requested, not required)
• Blazor for ASP.NET Web Forms Developers - Daniel Roth, Jeff Fritz, Taylor Southwick (PDF)
• Clean Code .NETstars3.7k
• Entity Framework Core Succinctly - Ricardo Peres
• .NET documentation - Microsoft Docs
• Using .NET Core, Docker, and Kubernetes Succinctly - Michele Aponte

• 1-Click - A virtual “trip aggregator” that assembles information on a wide variety of available modes: public transit, private, rail, rideshare, carpool, volunteer, paratransit, and walking and biking. Open-source on GitHubstars12.
• Bustime - Public transport real-time monitoring with WebSocket updates. Open-source on GitHubstars41.
• MBTA tile-serverstars5 - Scripts to create a Docker container that encapsulates all the elements necessary to develop map tiles for use on MBTA.com
• TransitScreen - Custom realtime displays of all local transportation choices
• Citylines.co - A collaborative platform for mapping transit systems, with an emphasis on their historical evolution.
• Bikeshare Map - Status of all worldwide bikeshare stations
• Bongo - Real-time Transit Tracking for Iowa City, Coralville and the University of Iowa. Combines three disparate transit systems into one UI.
• Brand New Subway - An interactive transportation planning game that lets players alter the NYC subway system to their heart's content.
• CityMapper Webapp - Really polished webapp with trip planner and route status for over 30 of cities.
• YourStop - Mobile friendly web app which consumes GTFS feeds and displays both live and scheduled trips for stops. Launched with MBTA, YRT/Viva and Maryland MTA.
• DC MetroHero - Realtime vehicle position and arrivals and departure information for the Washington, D.C. region's WMATA Metrorail and Metrobus systems. WebApp, Android, and iOS apps avaliable.
• go-openprojectstars5 - Go client library for interacting with OpenProject API.
• arch-audit - A utility like pkg-audit based on Arch Security Team data.
• DL4Sstars57 - Deep Learning for Swift: Accelerated tensor operations and dynamic neural networks based on reverse mode automatic differentiation for every device that can run Swift.
• SwiftCoreMLToolsstars100 - A Swift library for creating and exporting CoreML Models in Swift.
• tasksstars40 - An easy to use in-process scheduler for recurring tasks in Go.
• OCaml: Learn & Code iOS app - Learn and execute OCaml code from your iPhone/iPad/Mac.
• MMseqs2stars482 - Ultra-fast, sensitive search and clustering suite for protein and nucleotide sequence sets. [ paper-2017 | paper-2018 ]

• Codegiant — Project Management with Repository hosting & CI/CD. Free Plan Offers Unlimited Repositories,Projects & Documents with 5 Team Members. 500 CI/CD minutes per month. 30000 Serverless Code Run minutes per month.1GB repository storage.
• Microsoft PowerBI — Business Insights & Analytics by Microsoft. Free Plan offers limited use with 1 Million User licenses.
• pluralizestars1 - A very tiny library to pluralize words
• Fleek - Open Web development platform for building, hosting, and storing sites and apps on IPFS, Filecoin, and the Internet Computer. Source

• Deploying Blazor WebAssembly to GitHub Pages - March 30, 2021 - The .NET Docs Show - Deploying Blazor WebAssembly to GitHub Pages. What's better than Blazor? How about Blazor and a free place to host your Blazor app? In this episode, community member Niels Swimberghe shows the panel how to deploy Blazor apps to GitHub Pages.
• Microsoft Remote Deskto‪p - Connect to a remote PC or virtual apps and desktops made available by your admin.
• Xbar - Put the output from any script or program into your macOS Menu Bar (the BitBar reboot).
• Xcodesstars717 - Install and switch between multiple versions of Xcode.
• xcodesstars809 - A command-line tool to install and switch between multiple versions of Xcode.
• What is a NoSQL Database? Learn By Writing One In Python - Excellent tutorial in learning NoSQL vs RDBMS through building a toy database using Python.

• Introduction To NoSQL - Martin Fowler (54:52) - Talk given at GOTO 2012 as a great introduction to NoSQL databases, the types of NoSQL databases, their history, pros and cons, and how and when to use them.
• Seven Databases in Song (1:43) - Fun song from 2012 about seven (six are NoSQL) databases with a very condensed overview of how they each work.

• How the ICIJ Used Neo4j to Unravel the Panama Papers - Mar Cabra (32:02) - Learn how graph databases were key to explore who were the main names connected to companies in tax havens, including 140 politicians in more than 50 countries.

• What is NoSQL - Amazon AWS - Great high-level overview of NoSQL databases and how they compare to SQL database technologies and terminologies. Serves as landing page for Amazon's AWS services for NoSQL options of key-value (Amazon DynamoDB), document (Amazon DocumentDB), graph (Amazon Neptune), in-memory (Amazon ElastiCache), and search-engine (Amazon Elasticsearch) database.
• Titled Navigation Barstars245 [239⭐] - Animated bottom navigation bar that switch between icon and title by Pedro Massango.
• Scroll To Indexstars257 [244⭐] - Scroll to specified child element with given index for SliverList/ListView by Jerry Chen.
• Parallax Imagestars230 [225⭐] - Image parallax by Anatoly Pulyaevskiy.
• Bitmapstars107 [105⭐] - Perform Bitmap manipulations (such as contrast and exposure) with a help from the Dart FFI by Renan C. Araújo.
• SimpleAuthstars281 [278⭐] - Azure Active Directory, Amazon, Dropbox, Facebook, Github, Google, Instagram, Linked In, Microsoft Live Connect, Github, OAuth, Basic Auth by James Clancey.
• Flutter AppAuthstars149 [149⭐] - Plugin that provides a wrapper around the AppAuth iOS and Android SDKs by Michael Bui.
• Code Fieldstars43 - Customizable code field widget supporting syntax highlighting by Bertrand Bevillard.
• Square In-App Payments SDKstars264 [262⭐] - Take payments by embedding a card entry form in your app that produces nonces from customer-provided card information or digital wallets by Square.
• Beacon broadcaststars67 [68⭐] - Library for turning your phone into a beacon by Paulina Szklarska.
• Reactive Blestars176 [166⭐] - Handles BLE operations for multiple devices by Philips Hue.
• Ghost Riggerstars132 [131⭐] - Ghost Rigger is a cyberpunk inspired puzzle game by Iain Smith and Julio Ernesto Rodríguez Cabañas.
• JavaScript Interview #35 - Coderslang Master (PDF, email address requested, not required)
• eslint-define-configstars14 - Provide a defineConfig function for .eslintrc.js files.
• clean-regexstars283 - JavaScript regex linter that aims to help write better regular expressions by pointing out errors and suggesting improvements.
• Deletion Day - A holiday on April 4th focused on the privacy concerns of today’s Internet.
• doodleshellstars1 - Minimalist theme, includes git, terraform and aws status decorations.
• Jaeger - Distributed tracing platform backend used for monitoring and troubleshooting microservices-based distributed systems.
• Zipkin - Distributed tracing system backend that helps gather timing data needed to troubleshoot latency problems in service architectures.
• Linkerd - Ultra light Kubernetes-specific service mesh that adds observability, reliability, and security to Kubernetes applications without requiring any modification of the application itself.

• Consul - Solution to connect and configure applications across dynamic, distributed infrastructure and, with Consul Connect, enabling secure service-to-service communication with automatic TLS encryption and identity-based authorization.
• Istio - Open platform for providing a uniform way to integrate microservices, manage traffic flow across microservices, enforce policies and aggregate telemetry data.
• Introduction to Node.js (HTML)
• IP Geolocation API — IP Geolocation API from Abstract - Extensive free plan allowing 200,000 requests per month.
• yellstars0 - Yet another minimalistic logging library.
• Synapses - A lightweight library for neural networks.
• kaffestars108 - Kafka client library for Elixir.
• Google Analytics — Google Analytics
• Hotjar — Website Analytics and Reports . Free Plan allows 2000 pageviews/day. 100 snapshots/day (max capacity: 300). 3 snapshot heatmaps which can be stored for 365 days. Unlimited Team Members.
• StatCounter — Website Viewer Analytics. Free plan for analytics of 500 most recent visitors.
• jutstars98 - CLI to nicely display notebooks in the terminal.
• Flyte - Flyte makes it easy to create concurrent, scalable, and maintainable workflows for machine learning and data processing.
• CDK-Diastars58 - Automatic infrastructure diagrams for AWS CDK.
• Blitz - The Fullstack React Framework
• Teaching Python - Two middle school teachers learning and teaching Python.
• Podcast Addict - Android Podcast player
• Smooksstars298 - Framework for fragment-based message processing. (Apache-2.0 OR LGPL-3.0-or-later)
• HiCoffee - Super efficient caffeine tracker app with Apple Watch support (iOS and Apple Watch).
• ng-http-cachingstars6 - Cache for HTTP requests in Angular application.
• ng-portalstars4 Component property connection in Angular application.
• ng-generic-pipestars1 Generic pipe for Angular application.
• Awesome Lattice FPGAsstars86 - A curated list of awesome open-source FPGA boards
